title: NPU Feature
description: A single NPU platform feature extracted from source code

source_files.description: Absolute or repo-relative paths to source files implementing this feature

config_keys.description: CLI args and config keys that enable/configure this feature

env_vars.description: Environment variables that affect this feature

dependent_features.description: Other features that this feature depends on

description.description: Human-readable description of what this feature does

models_using.description: Model architectures that use this feature

fingerprint.description: SHA256 hash of normalized source code for change detection
